entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and aggregation platform on VeChainThor. BetterSwap routes swaps across VeChain liquidity sources and also provides its own liquidity-pool, position-management, wrapping, transfer, and VeBetter-related interfaces. The official application and documentation remain current.
entity.notes: Launch date follows the public BetterSwap launch announcement on November 24, 2024. BetterSwap is modeled as a DEX rather than only an interface because current documentation includes native pool creation and liquidity-management functions in addition to aggregation.

events.title: BetterSwap publicly launched on VeChainThor
events.description: BetterSwap launched as a VeChainThor decentralized-exchange aggregator and trading interface in November 2024.
events.notes: The launch date is based on the public launch announcement in the VeChain community.

evidence.title: BetterSwap Official Launch
evidence.notes: Public launch announcement describing BetterSwap as a VeChain DEX aggregator.

evidence.title: BetterSwap introduction
evidence.notes: Official documentation identifies BetterSwap as a decentralized exchange and aggregation protocol on VeChainThor.

evidence.title: BetterSwap liquidity pools
evidence.notes: Official documentation describes current liquidity pools, fee earning, and pool participation.

evidence.title: BetterSwap create-pool documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation confirms native pool-creation functionality beyond simple routing aggregation.
